name: wikivault-unified
description: AI-powered wiki generation with smart multi-word matching, category organisation, Virtual Linker integration, and comprehensive context injection. Full LM Studio REST API v1 support with hardware-aware model defaults. By adhdboy411 & Claude.

scripts.validate: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.version: node scripts/version.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: adhdboy411 & Claude
